# Creatify AI

> Creatify AI is an AI Tools platform with API access on a reasonable tier. 15% off at $39 in June 2026.

## Quick Info
- Category: AI Tools
- Rating: 4.9/5
- URL: https://creatify.ai
- Promo Code: card
- Discount: 15% off — $39

## Description
Creatify AI delivers focused content-creation with API access included without enterprise sales calls. The default outputs are ship-ready without heavy editorial. Integrations cover Zapier, Make, Slack, Notion, and Google Workspace. Predictable releases on a regular cadence.

## Key Features
- API access on reasonable tier (no enterprise sales calls)
- Ship-ready default outputs
- Integrations for 80% of common stacks
- Free tier available with limitations
